mapper.select:
SELECT w.id AS worker_id, w.worker_name, w.face_status, wf.face_img_url, wf.collect_time, afr.register_id, afr.face_feature, afr.model_code, afr.model_name, afr.register_status, afr.register_time, afr.fail_reason FROM tb_worker w LEFT JOIN tb_worker_face wf ON w.id = wf.worker_id LEFT JOIN ai_face_register afr ON w.id = afr.worker_id WHERE w.del_flag = '0'
AND w.worker_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{workerName}, '%')
AND (afr.register_status = #{registerStatus} OR (afr.register_status IS NULL AND #{registerStatus} = '0'))
ORDER BY w.id ASC

SELECT w.id AS worker_id, w.worker_name, w.face_status, wf.face_img_url, wf.collect_time, afr.register_id, afr.face_feature, afr.model_code, afr.model_name, afr.register_status, afr.register_time, afr.fail_reason FROM ai_face_register afr LEFT JOIN tb_worker w ON afr.worker_id = w.id LEFT JOIN tb_worker_face wf ON w.id = wf.worker_id WHERE afr.register_id = #{registerId}

SELECT w.id AS worker_id, w.worker_name, w.face_status, wf.face_img_url, wf.collect_time, afr.register_id, afr.face_feature, afr.model_code, afr.model_name, afr.register_status, afr.register_time, afr.fail_reason FROM ai_face_register afr LEFT JOIN tb_worker w ON afr.worker_id = w.id LEFT JOIN tb_worker_face wf ON w.id = wf.worker_id WHERE afr.worker_id = #{workerId} AND afr.model_code = #{modelCode}
mapper.insert: insert into ai_face_register( worker_id, worker_name, face_img_url, face_feature, model_code, model_name, register_status, register_time, fail_reason, create_by, create_time )values( #{workerId}, #{workerName}, #{faceImgUrl}, #{faceFeature}, #{modelCode}, #{modelName}, #{registerStatus}, #{registerTime}, #{failReason}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update ai_face_register set face_img_url = #{faceImgUrl}, face_feature = '', register_status = '0', register_time = null, fail_reason = '人脸照片已更新，请重新录入', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where worker_id = #{workerId}
mapper.delete:
delete from ai_face_register where register_id in
#{registerId}
